title: Saekano: How to Raise a Boring Girlfriend Fine
original_title: 冴えない彼女の育てかた Fine
overview: After blessing software announced their first work, Eriri and Utaha leave the group to join popular creator Akane Kosaka in developing a major game called Fields Chronicle. Meanwhile, Tomoya and Megumi join hands with their new members and various other parties to produce their new game.  What will become of Eriri and Utaha’s major work? Will the relationship between Tomoya and Megumi change? And what will be the ultimate fate of blessing software’s new game?

trailers.title: 劇場版 本予告
trailers.channel_name: アニプレックス チャンネル
